name: aurora-ai-source
title: Aurora AI Source
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora AI Source — Claude Design parity.
docs:
Aurora block that installs Aurora AI Source.

Install `aurora-tokens` and `aurora-badge` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/source.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-badge`.
